title: Azalea Wood Set
description: A simple mod to add the azalea wood set to the game in its entirety!
body:
## What Does Azalea Wood Set Do?
Azalea Wood Set does exactly what the title says! It adds the full wood set to Minecraft: logs, wood, stripped variants, planks, stairs, slabs, fences, gates, trapdoors, doors, pressure plates, buttons, signs, and hanging signs! The textures are meant to fit in fully with vanilla textures and contribute to the building potential by adding a wood that conveys age. Additionally, this mod aims to add the blocks in the same way Mojang would, so they are inserted into the creative inventory in the right locations and the azalea wood logs replace the oak logs found in azalea trees.

 
## Note
**Fabric Only**: Requires [**Fabric API**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

**Versions**: 1.19.3 - 1.21.10 & 26.1-26.1.1

*Must be installed on both server and client.*

This mod is still being updated. However, with the many changes in the recent updates, development will be slower. I will continue supproting the latest version of minecraft, so some versions may be skipped.

## Misc

Can I include this in modpacks? Yes! I would appreciate being given credit, though.

Please report issues on my GitHub page, [here](https://github.com/Fire-Horse27/azalea-wood/issues).
